## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. With input `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include the full traceback if available.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- Package versions (from `pip list`):

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or sample data files.
